summary: Great Bay stage decomp work added several grgreatbay.c function bodies, introduced typed Great Bay stage and ground variable layouts, centralized a duplicated ground-stage random-range helper, and updated Tingle item prototypes needed by the new code. The bot report recorded four new grgreatbay text matches and several near-matches/improvements, with one .sdata regression.

key_files.role: Primary Great Bay decomp file; adds StageAttr typing, item/stage includes, implementations for several previously stubbed functions, and cleanup of existing Great Bay logic.
Adds and reshapes Great Bay GroundVars layouts, including bitfields, gobj array, new greatbay4 vars, and union entry.
Adds shared rand_range helper and ZRANDI macro using HSD_Randi, replacing duplicated local rand_inline helpers in several stage files.
Removes local rand_inline and switches Izumi random timer sites to rand_range.
Removes local rand_inline and switches Kraid random timer site to rand_range.
Removes local rand_inline and switches Old Kongo random timer sites to rand_range.
Removes local rand_inline and switches Old Yoshi random timer sites to rand_range.
Updates grGreatBay_801F63F4 prototype from unknown to bool grGreatBay_801F63F4(Ground_GObj*).
Updates Tingle item prototypes used by Great Bay code.

what_changed.text: Implemented grGreatBay_801F4694, grGreatBay_801F499C, grGreatBay_801F5460, grGreatBay_801F5600, grGreatBay_801F5AF8, grGreatBay_801F5E28, grGreatBay_801F60C4, and grGreatBay_801F63F4 or substantially filled their bodies in src/melee/gr/grgreatbay.c.
Introduced grGb_StageAttr and changed grGb_804D69E0.x0 from s16* to grGb_StageAttr*, replacing raw index accesses such as grGb_804D69E0.x0[1] with field accesses such as grGb_804D69E0.x0->x2.

Reworked Great Bay ground-variable structs: greatbay gained bitfields and typed slots; greatbay2 changed four separate gobj fields into HSD_GObj* gobjs[4] plus bitfields; greatbay4 was added and included in the Ground union.
Added shared rand_range and ZRANDI in gr/inlines.h, then removed duplicate local rand_inline helpers from grizumi.c, grkraid.c, groldkongo.c, and groldyoshi.c.
Updated prototypes for grGreatBay_801F63F4, it_802EBFAC, and it_802ECA70 from unknown signatures to typed signatures used by the new Great Bay code.
Bot report recorded four new 100% matches in main/melee/gr/grgreatbay: grGreatBay_801F5600, grGreatBay_801F4694, grGreatBay_801F5E28, and grGreatBay_801F5AF8.
Bot report recorded improvements, but not full matches, for grGreatBay_801F499C, grGreatBay_801F60C4, grGreatBay_801F63F4, grGreatBay_801F5460, .sdata2, and grGreatBay_801F62F8.
Bot report recorded a broken .sdata match for main/melee/gr/grgreatbay, dropping from 100.00% to 81.82%.

smart_moves.text: The PR consolidated multiple identical local random-range helpers into a single ground inline, reducing duplicated generated-looking code across stage files.
The PR changed Great Bay stage attribute access from raw s16 pointer/indexing to a typed struct with offset-annotated fields before using those fields throughout new code.
The PR used arrays and loops for repeated child ground-object operations in grGreatBay_801F5A00 and grGreatBay_801F5AF8 instead of preserving four separate gobj fields and repeated calls.
The PR updated owning headers for newly recovered signatures instead of leaving UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS where bodies and callsites provided typed usage.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When several stage files carry identical local random-range helpers, a shared inline can express the common source pattern and simplify callers, but the helper's semantics must preserve the zero-range HSD_Randi guard.

For stage attributes loaded through an opaque pointer, recovering a TU-local offset-annotated struct can make decomp code more reviewable than repeated raw array indexing while preserving unknown field names until semantics are proven.
Repeated sibling stage objects can be represented as an array plus counted loops when the old fields differ only by index or map ID.
If a newly recovered function body proves a previously unknown public signature, update the owning header prototype rather than relying on unknown declarations.

naming_conventions.name: grGb_StageAttr
naming_conventions.convention: Use a stage-specific struct name for recovered Great Bay stage attributes while keeping unknown fields offset-named x0, x2, x4, etc.

naming_conventions.name: rand_range
naming_conventions.convention: Shared ground inline name used for inclusive-looking range selection between two endpoints with zero-range guard.

naming_conventions.name: gobjs[4]
naming_conventions.convention: Use an array name for four Great Bay child ground objects formerly represented as gobj5, gobj6, gobj7, and gobj8.

naming_conventions.name: xC5.b0123456 and xC5.b7 / x12.b0-b3
naming_conventions.convention: Use packed bitfield names when bit roles are not yet semantically named but bit access is known.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: PAD_STACK was used narrowly in several newly added Great Bay functions, including grGreatBay_801F5AF8, grGreatBay_801F5E28, grGreatBay_801F60C4, and grGreatBay_801F63F4.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Standards require explicit verifier evidence for PAD_STACK; the bot report supports some function matches/improvements but does not explain each PAD_STACK necessity.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used HSD_ASSERT macro forms for recovered assert sites in grGreatBay_801F499C and grGreatBay_801F62F8 instead of raw assert expansion.
Used ABS(dx) in grGreatBay_801F60C4 for a common absolute-value expression.
Replaced manual ternary/HSD_Randi range code with rand_range calls in Great Bay and other stage files.

review_feedback.feedback: Matched code improved by +0.07% / +2816 bytes; four new matches were reported for grGreatBay_801F5600, grGreatBay_801F4694, grGreatBay_801F5E28, and grGreatBay_801F5AF8.
One broken match was reported: main/melee/gr/grgreatbay .sdata changed from 100.00% to 81.82%, with matched data decreasing by 24 bytes.
No human review comments or review records were included in the loaded PR evidence.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs touching grGreatBay_801F499C or grGreatBay_801F60C4 to see whether the near-matches reached 100%.
Search for subsequent fixes to main/melee/gr/grgreatbay .sdata after PR2388.
Search for later semantic renames of grGb_StageAttr fields x0 through x7C.
Search for rand_range or ZRANDI usage in ground stage files after PR2388.
Search for PAD_STACK in grgreatbay.c to see whether later cleanup removed or justified it.
Search for grGreatBay_801F63F4 follow-up changes or item spawn table data ownership notes.

notes: PR metadata, changed files, and bot report are available and concrete.
The PR body is empty and no human review comments are present.
The diff excerpt and loaded raw diff are truncated in the prompt, but targeted local reads covered the key non-primary changed files and helper/type sections.
Bot report provides validation for four new matches and several improvements, but it also records a .sdata regression.
No unsupported claim is made about author intent or complete object-level validation beyond the bot report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Centralize repeated stage random-range helpers
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR2388 replaced duplicated local rand_inline helpers in multiple ground stage files with a shared gr/inlines.h rand_range helper that preserves the HSD_Randi zero-range guard.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover typed stage attribute structs before widespread field use
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR2388 introduced grGb_StageAttr and changed grGb_804D69E0.x0 from s16* to a typed pointer before using offset-named fields throughout Great Bay functions.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use arrays and loops for repeated sibling ground objects
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR2388 replaced separate Great Bay gobj5-gobj8 fields with gobjs[4] and looped over the repeated child operations in grGreatBay_801F5AF8.

source_update_candidates.title: gr/inlines.h contains shared ground rand_range helper after PR2388
source_update_candidates.text: PR2388 added ZRANDI and static inline int rand_range(int a, int b) to src/melee/gr/inlines.h and converted several stage files from local rand_inline helpers to this shared helper.
source_update_candidates.reason: Could help future curators resolve repeated HSD_Randi range idioms in ground stage code.

source_update_candidates.title: Possible Great Bay stage attribute layout from PR2388
source_update_candidates.text: PR2388 introduced a TU-local grGb_StageAttr layout with offsets 0x00 through 0xA4-ish, including x70[4], x78, and x7C[10] entries with kind/weight fields. This should be curated only if corroborated by data ownership/symbol evidence.
source_update_candidates.reason: The PR evidence supports the layout being used in source, but field semantics and data ownership are not fully established by the slice.

source_update_candidates.title: Great Bay uses Tingle item prototypes in ittincle.h
source_update_candidates.text: PR2388 updated it_802EBFAC to void it_802EBFAC(Item_GObj*) and it_802ECA70 to Item_GObj* it_802ECA70(HSD_GObj*) for calls from Great Bay code.
source_update_candidates.reason: Header ownership and callsite usage are evidenced, but broader item semantics should remain source-owned.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK use in this PR as a general standard; the bot report supports some function matches but the slice does not explain each stack pad's necessity.
Do not infer semantic names for grGb_StageAttr fields from offset names alone.
Do not treat the .sdata change as accepted data cleanup; the bot report explicitly lists it as a broken match.
Do not claim human reviewer approval or intent; no human review comments were loaded.
